top_categories.workout_context: 11,811ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
At mile 60 of 89, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
133ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Gran Fondo Pirineus' demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before June.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 89 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Gran Fondo Pirineus. Train it until it feels boring.
Gran Fondo Pirineus' mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 89 miles.
At Gran Fondo Pirineus, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 11,811ft of climbing on mixed terrain does to your power file on race day.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 89 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 89 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.
Tempo is Gran Fondo Pirineus' race pace. The wattage you'll hold for 89 miles on mixed terrain. Train it until it's automatic.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Gran Fondo Pirineus’s 89 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Gran Fondo Pirineus with 11,811ft of climbing, much of it above 8,000ft demands altitude preparation. Arrive 5–7 days early for acclimatization. Expect 5–15% power reduction at altitude. Increase iron intake 4 weeks out. Hydrate aggressively — altitude increases fluid loss by 20–40%.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on VO2max, Durability, and TT Threshold to prepare you for 89 miles of mixed terrain in Camprodon, Girona, Spain.
